title: EVA hater question
wikitext:
[]: EVA hater question Post by DevRei17 » Sat Jan 02, 2010 12:48 pm I was talking to a girl about anime via YouTube and I wanted you guy's two cents. What do you say to someone who thinks EVA is “pretentious nonsense”? (Mind you, the person i'm refereing to thinks Inuyasha and Lucky Star are much deeper than EVA and have more value and “Doesn't screw over it's fanbase like EVA.”) Should I respond back or just ignore this YouTube user all together? I know the obvious thing do is ignore her, but I thought the latter half of her response was too funny to ignore.

[]: Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Jan 02, 2010 12:54 pm While there is a place to debate the depth and elements of Evangelion, I don't think the comments of a YouTube video are really the best venue for it. Now be aware that, as stated by the creators, there are indeed elements of pretension to Evangelion, particularly in relation to the use of religious imagery. However, regarding the main elements of the plot and charcaters, Evangelion is the Mariana Trench of anime series, if not television series in general.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 02, 2010 1:09 pm Don't pay any mind to people that think that way. Trying to convince them other wise, about it being "nonsense", can just be annoying. Especially if it's someone on youtube. tl;dr - ignore 'em.

[]: Post by DevRei17 » Sat Jan 02, 2010 1:11 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: While there is a place to debate the depth and elements of Evangelion, I don't think the comments of a YouTube video are really the best venue for it.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sat Jan 02, 2010 1:27 pm In general, most things posted as youtube comments are best assumed to be the complete opposite of a true or well-informed viewpoint and then never thought about again.

[]: Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat Jan 02, 2010 1:44 pm People are youtube can be stupid 90% of the time. Don't care what they say really.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jan 02, 2010 2:06 pm Lol, Lucky Star, deep? That's like saying The Big O is a happy-go-lucky cheery pop comedy with moe moe. Don't even bother. This person isn't worth anyone's time if they're not a troll.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 02, 2010 3:36 pm Yeah, just ignore it. There's better things to do with your time then arguing with people on Youtube... Like arguing with people here on our forums. Seriously though, it's one of those cases where you can't change people's opinions unless they want to change it themselves, so just don't even bother going there.

[]: Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 02, 2010 5:46 pm If she really believes these things than she's an idiot and not worth your time.

[]: Post by ZapX » Sat Jan 02, 2010 5:55 pm We don't need to do this again , do we?
summary: []: EVA hater question Post by DevRei17 » Sat Jan 02, 2010 12:48 pm I was talking to a girl about anime via YouTube and I wanted you guy's two cents. What do you say to someone who thinks EVA is “pretentious nonsense”? (Mind you, the person i'm refereing to thinks Inuyasha and Lucky Star are much deeper than EVA and have more value and “Doesn't screw over it's fanbase like EVA.”) Should I respond back or just ignore this YouTube user all toge
